pure-canvas.$description: Pure Canvas — Page and surface background — the entire interface lives on this single white plane

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, product titles, icon strokes, outlined button borders — the only chromatic dark in the system

graphite.$description: Graphite — Secondary text, meta labels, footer copy — a near-identical companion to Ink Black for subtle hierarchy steps

slate-mute.$description: Slate Mute — Muted helper text, tertiary metadata, disabled states

hairline-gray.$description: Hairline Gray — Hairline dividers, card separators, input borders, table rules — the sole structural line color, used at 1px

pure-black.$description: Pure Black — Maximum-contrast text and icon fills where the deepest dark is needed

helvetica.$description: Sole typeface for every UI text element — navigation, section headings, product titles, prices, buttons, and body copy. Weight 700 for section headers and product names creates the only typographic distinction in the system; weight 400 handles everything else. The 15px body / 20px header pairing is unusually small, reinforcing a catalog-card density rather than a marketing-page density.

gtstandard-m.$description: GTStandard-M — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

page-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: The single global background — no nested surface layers, no card containers, no elevated panels
